default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss converting LLC to C-Corp and explore accounting/tax services for rapidly growing startup fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decision to form new C-Corp in January 2024 for cleaner transition and fundraising readiness](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [API Accounting to provide full-service accounting, including bookkeeping, tax prep, and planning](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Need to carefully consider payroll/HR platform selection for scalability (e.g. ADP vs. Gusto vs. Rippling)](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
  - [Importance of proper insurance coverage and liability protection during transition period](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Structure and Growth

  - [LLC started 3 years ago for consulting work, now doing fractional CMO and workshops](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 0 to $3M annual revenue run rate in 6-7 months](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [25 clients including public companies like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [17 contractors, planning to convert some to W-2 employees](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### C-Corp Conversion Rationale

  - [Liability protection needed due to scale (publishing 20M words/month for clients)](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Fundraising plans: considering SAFE notes at $30-40M cap](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Equity allocation for co-founder, early employees, and attracting top talent](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Exit strategy: aiming for 3-5 year timeline, potentially $100M+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Timing and Process for C-Corp Formation

  - [Decided to form new C-Corp in January 2024 vs. converting existing LLC](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Cost: $1,500 for C-Corp setup, avoid \~$1,000 in additional 2023 tax prep fees](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Keep LLC open for 12-24 months to facilitate transition of contracts/payments](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [New QuickBooks Online account to be set up for clean separation](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

### Accounting and Tax Services

  - [API Accounting to provide full-service support: bookkeeping, tax prep, planning](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Sonya (bookkeeper) to handle day-to-day transactions and monthly close](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Kelby (CPA) available for strategic tax planning and guidance](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Payroll and HR Considerations

  - [Currently using remote.com for international contractors](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Need robust HR/payroll system for scaling (considering ADP, Gusto, Rippling)](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
  - [Importance of future-proofing choice for benefits, background checks, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)

### Financial Management

  - [Using ramp.com for corporate cards (currently $15k limit)](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Need to properly structure home office expenses in new C-Corp setup](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [2023 financials relatively clean with dedicated business credit card](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Insurance and Liability

  - [General liability and potentially umbrella coverage recommended](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2755.0)
  - [Corporate veil provides protection, but additional insurance advised during transition](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)
  - [Lawyer to be consulted on specific insurance needs](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to connect API Accounting with company lawyer to finalize C-Corp formation details](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)
  - [Kelby to introduce Marcel to Sonya for bookkeeping handoff and QuickBooks setup](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=3350.0)
  - [Research and decide on payroll/HR platform for new C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
  - [Consult lawyer on recommended insurance coverage](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)
  - [Begin organizing 2023 financial documents for tax preparation](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=3234.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to address any remaining questions and finalize transition plan](https://fathom.video/share/_tQaMN7KBFj9ffiSTTudafq65H6FFTEc?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)

action_items.description: Introduce Marcel to Sonya (bookkeeper). Set up call for next week.
Connect Kelby with lawyer. Discuss C-Corp setup, name, ownership structure.
Decide on payroll/HR platform (Remote vs Rippling vs ADP). Inform Kelby.
Discuss with Sonya about untangling old QuickBooks file and setting up new one for C-Corp.
Prepare QuickBooks handoff. Organize receipts, credit card statements, bank statements for Sonya.
Wait for Marcel's green light, then proceed with C-Corp setup.
Send follow-up email to Marcel outlining action items from meeting.
